etymology.description: semantic 扌(手) (shǒu, "hand") + phonetic 詹(詹)
etymology.interpretation: 儋(dān, "to carry on the shoulder") is a variant form of 擔(dān, "to carry") where the semantic 扌(手) (shǒu, "hand") indicates the action of holding or carrying, while the phonetic component 詹(詹) provides the pronunciation. The character suggests carrying items on the shoulder with one’s hand.
